MODULE: cosmos.integration.financial.tradfi.stocks
FILE: cosmos/integration/financial/tradfi/stocks.py (82 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos TradFi Module - Stocks & Forex
-----------------------------------------

"Stocks, bonds, golden parachutes... I want it all!"

Integrates with Alpha Vantage / Yahoo Finance / OANDA for traditional market data.

CLASSES:
- TradFiAgent
  Methods: async def get_stock_quote(self, symbol: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def get_forex_rate(self, from_currency: str, to_currency: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def analyze_sentiment(self, symbol: str) -> str
